title: Figure 2 in Comparison of three commercial multiplex PCR assays for the diagnosis of intestinal protozoa
author: Autier, Brice
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 2. Venn diagram of results for Giardia detection. All Giardia-positive samples detected by the RIDA®GENE assay were detected by the G-DiaParaTM and the BD MaxTM assays, and almost all those detected by the G-DiaParaTM assay were detected by the BD MaxTM assay (1 exception).
steps_raw: Figure 2. Venn diagram of results for Giardia detection. All Giardia-positive samples detected by the RIDA®GENE assay were detected by the G-DiaParaTM and the BD MaxTM assays, and almost all those detected by the G-DiaParaTM assay were detected by the BD MaxTM assay (1 exception).
